scripts.install:anvil: bash -lc 'if ! command -v anvil >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && foundryup; fi'
scripts.setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run setup-contracts && bun run ui:vendor && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.compile-contracts: cd solidity && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun x tsc --project tsconfig-compile.json && bun run ./js/compile.js
scripts.generate: bun run compile-contracts && bun run ui:vendor
scripts.ui:setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd solidity && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run setup && cd .. && bun run generate && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.ui:build: bun run generate && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.check:changed: bunx @biomejs/biome check --changed --since origin/main solidity/ts ui/ts ui/css
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write package.json scripts ui/package.json ui/tsconfig.json ui/build solidity/ts ui/ts ui/css
